headline: CME Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Record Market Data Growth
summary: CME Group beats Q2 estimates as record market data revenues and resilient trading activity lift results, while expanding its product lineup.

raw.headline: CME Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Record Market Data Growth
raw.summary: CME Group beats Q2 estimates as record market data revenues and resilient trading activity lift results, while expanding its product lineup.

headline: CB Q2 Earnings Beat on Higher Underwriting and Investment Income
summary: Chubb's Q2 earnings beat estimates as underwriting profit climbed, catastrophe losses fell, and record investment income strengthened results.

raw.headline: CB Q2 Earnings Beat on Higher Underwriting and Investment Income
raw.summary: Chubb's Q2 earnings beat estimates as underwriting profit climbed, catastrophe losses fell, and record investment income strengthened results.
